quote: Optimism is the one quality more associated with success and happiness than any other. – Brian Tracy
fact: Crocodiles and alligators are surprisingly fast on land.  Although they are rapid, they are not agile.  So, if being chased by one, run in a zigzag line to lose him or her.
joke: You will never guess what Elsa did to the balloon. She let it go.
